creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
adamw       2010-09-06 20:30:14 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    shells/bash-completion Makefile pkg-plist 
  Log:
  The rsync completion plugin causes the shell to freeze on amd64.
  Until that gets resolved, I'm disconnecting the rsync plugin from
  the build on amd64.
  
  PR:             ports/150322
  Submitted by:   ehaupt
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.21      +13 -2     ports/shells/bash-completion/Makefile
  1.4       +1 -1      ports/shells/bash-completion/pkg-plist
